_comment: Plan F mainnet-prep placeholder. Populated post-mainnet-deploy. Until then, every field is null on purpose — `src/lib/addresses.ts` reads ArkAge contracts from env vars, not from this file, so leaving values null here is safe.

canonical._comment: Re-verify against Arc's mainnet docs before pinning. Testnet addresses are intentionally NOT copied here — every canonical contract gets re-checked at mainnet deploy time.
